input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.10.8 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.10.8
            TITLE: noise test completion

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.10.8: Noise Test Completion
IN.10.8 Noise Test Completion  
Noise Tests must be passed before a vehicle may attempt any further inspections

final_answer: Noise Tests must be passed before a vehicle may attempt any further inspections
